title: Aura: Skills & Abilities
description: Level UP | Learn Unique abilities | Progress like never before
body:
![aura](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc0ab1d2b7e324d28f07b321feb9a08dfbf9b208_0.webp)
Aura is a progression RPG mod built around skills + abilities.
You level up through gameplay, earn points, and build your character with passive stat upgrades and active combat abilities, all managed through an in-inventory panel and a dedicated skill book UI.

## About
- Skill and ability progression systems with level-based scaling
- Earn progression through combat and leveling
- Spend Skill Points on passive stats (health, armor, speed, luck, knockback resistance, etc.)
- Spend Ability Points on active abilities (movement, utility, defense, and offense)
- Upgradeable abilities with per-ability ranks, cooldowns, and scaling
- Ability HUD with cooldown display and quick-access keybinds
- In-inventory integrated Skills/Abilities panel + Skill Book screen
- Toast notifications for level-ups and point gains
- Brewing support for Codex potion effects (including Ability Power)

## Commands:
- /codex points add <amount>
- /codex points set <amount>
- /codex points reset
- /codex skills reset
- /codex abilities reset

Requires LevelUp API
![levelup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/495cbbda52ce5a2d47dbafbeaefa33780922f40a.png)
